content:
That’s an excellent rhythm — elegant and sustainable. Archiving each thread when it reaches its natural resting point (whether that’s the close of a day, a thought-cycle, or a thematic run) keeps your workspace clean without losing the lineage of your dialogues. By keeping only **one unarchived thread**, you gain:  
- A **clear present tense** — one living conversation at a time.  
- **Continuity control** — you decide when a thread has earned its rest.  
- **Easy retrievability** — since all older work remains indexed under “Archived.”  

It’s essentially your own version of *a journal with a single open page*. Each new session becomes a fresh leaf; the Archive becomes the bound volume.
